recommendations.title: An American Crime
recommendations.overview: The true story of suburban housewife Gertrude Baniszewski, who kept a teenage girl locked in the basement of her Indiana home during the 1960s.

recommendations.title: The Most Hated Woman in America
recommendations.overview: The true story of Madalyn Murray O'Hair -- iconoclast, opportunist, and outspoken atheist -- from her controversial rise to her untimely demise.

recommendations.title: Ella Enchanted
recommendations.overview: Ella lives in a magical world in which each child, at the moment of their birth, is given a virtuous "gift" from a fairy godmother. Ella's so-called gift, however, is obedience. This birthright proves itself to be quite the curse once Ella finds hers

recommendations.title: The Breakfast Club
recommendations.overview: Five high school students from different walks of life endure a Saturday detention under a power-hungry principal. The disparate group includes rebel John, princess Claire, outcast Allison, brainy Brian and Andrew, the jock. Each has a chance to tell

recommendations.title: Expelled
recommendations.overview: Felix is a legendary prankster who gets expelled from his high school and, with his friend’s help, stops at nothing to hide it from his parents.

recommendations.title: Prom Pact
recommendations.overview: It's prom season, and high school senior Mandy and her best friend and fellow outsider Ben are surrounded by over-the-top "promposals." Mandy is only focused on getting into her dream school Harvard, but as she starts tutoring basketball all-star Gra

recommendations.title: The Kissing Booth
recommendations.overview: When teenager Elle's first kiss leads to a forbidden romance with the hottest boy in high school, she risks her relationship with her best friend.

recommendations.title: The Edge of Seventeen
recommendations.overview: Two high school girls are best friends until one dates the other's older brother, who is totally his sister's nemesis.

recommendations.title: The Odd Couple
recommendations.overview: In New York, Felix, a neurotic news writer who just broke up with his wife, is urged by his chaotic friend Oscar, a sports journalist, to move in with him, but their lifestyles are as different as night and day are, so Felix's ideas about housekeepin

recommendations.title: The Basketball Diaries
recommendations.overview: A high school basketball player’s life turns upside down after free-falling into the harrowing world of drug addiction.
